description.en: OpenAI's GPT-Image-1 model for high-quality image generation with advanced text rendering
description.de: OpenAI's GPT-Image-1 Modell für hochwertige Bildgenerierung mit fortgeschrittenem Text-Rendering

meta.notes: GPT-Image-1 via Direct OpenAI API. API key in OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable. High quality image generation with advanced text rendering and instruction following.

known_biases.en: Strong English-language bias in text understanding
Tendency toward commercially polished, magazine-quality aesthetics
Aggressive content filtering may suppress legitimate artistic expression
known_biases.de: Aggressive Inhaltsfilterung kann legitimen künstlerischen Ausdruck unterdrücken

known_gaps.en: No transparency: training data, model size, and architecture are trade secrets
known_gaps.de: Keine Transparenz: Trainingsdaten, Modellgröße und Architektur sind Geschäftsgeheimnisse

known_gaps.en: Closed-source: no independent audit of biases possible
known_gaps.de: Closed-Source: keine unabhängige Prüfung von Biases möglich
